content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.77%, Bank Nifty -0.85%, VIX elevated at 18.57 with US markets soft (Dow -1.13%). Breadth is weak across financials, autos, and realty though selective pockets (defence, capex, pharma turnarounds, gold loans) show strong stock-specific momentum on Q4 prints. Risk-off backdrop argues for tightening SLs on existing book and being selective on new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent - position is +6.1%, SL already at 1029 sits 1.5% below CMP 1045 (within trail-gap discipline). Stored SL is already above breakeven. No micro-adjust needed - keeping levels as-is. Bullish sector backdrop with RBI rate cut tailwind, sub-1% GNPA, AUM milestone. Treating this as HOLD - emitting MODIFY only because stored values match (no-op deliberately avoided). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: SL 1029 (1.5% gap to CMP 1045) is well-placed; raising it would violate the 1% trail-gap floor or be a micro-adjust. Original target 1110 still valid (R1 1069, R2 1086 just below). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock made fresh ATH 1757 today before fading to 1723 (+3.99%). Position now +1.4%. Stored SL 1710 sits 0.8% below CMP 1723 - already inside the 1.0% trail-gap floor risk. Keeping SL at 1710 (tight but it's the existing level, not a micro-adjust). Strong fundamentals (FY26 cargo+15%, MOSL TP 1900). No-op acknowledged - converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 is already snug below CMP 1723 (0.78% gap, slightly below 1% guideline but not raising further would violate guidance). Letting it ride - if it stops, we book +0.6%; if breakout extends to target 1820, R:R remains favorable. Thesis intact: ATH breakout, +25% FY26 revenue, MOSL TP 1900."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7% with CMP 13443 vs SL 13400 (very tight, 0.3% away). Today's intraday low 13360 already tested below SL territory but recovered. Auto sector weak today but fundamentals intact: record April sales +33%, Rs 140 dividend. SL is doing its job - if it triggers, the structural-low break confirms the bear case. No reason to widen SL (would violate tightening rule anyway). Hold and let SL execute if breached."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.6% with CMP 204.65 vs SL 204.00 (only 0.3% above SL). Fundamentals strong (Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA improving). Banking sector weak today is the headwind. SL is the discipline - if 204 breaks, structural support gone. Not widening SL. Hold and respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3% at 4642, current SL 4575 = entry (breakeven). Trailing slightly to 4555 to give room (1.9% gap from CMP, within trail-gap discipline). Strong defence backdrop, new CMD catalyst, +31% MoM rally. Wait - 4555 is BELOW current SL 4575, would be loosening which is rejected. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry 4575 (breakeven). CMP 4642 is +1.4%. Trail to higher level not justified yet (P&L < +2% threshold for further tightening). 4575 SL gives 1.4% gap - on the edge but acceptable. Strong thesis with defence capex, Tejas Mk1A orders. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.5%. CMP 121.71 vs SL 119 (2.2% gap). Gold thesis intact (central bank buying, geopolitical premium, weak rupee). MACD bearish near-term but consolidation is normal after the strong run. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 35,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1478.00,
      "stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "target": 1570.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +124% YoY, revenue +60%, record FY26 pre-sales Rs 8,140 cr (+30%). Stock gapped to 1577 then faded to 1476 - giving entry near VWAP 1507. Bucking realty sector weakness on results. Nuvama TP 1631. Position size: 35*1478 = ~Rs 51,730 (~5.1% of capital). Risk: 1478-1420 = 58 (3.9%). Reward: 1570-1478 = 92 (6.2%). R:R = 92/58 = 1.59. Risk budget: 5.1% × 3.9% = 0.20% of portfolio - well within 0.5% cap. No binary event imminent (results just out). No governance flags identified."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Cancelling this entry - already held in CNC, no need to add MIS layer."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held - no fresh add. +31% one-month rally is technically extended for stacking more size."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CEMPRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +113%) and order book momentum, but +14% on 14.6x volume after already breaking ATH means we'd be chasing the gap. Today's H/L of 954/900 (~6% intraday range) shows extreme volatility - SL placement difficult. Watchlist for pullback to 880-900 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P/E 310x is extreme. Single-asset Zaynich approval binary. +13% gap-up intraday range 1500-1604 (volatile). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SEBI warning to MD on Apr 27 for delayed encumbrance disclosure = active governance overhang per Rule 13. Q4 earnings call May 15 = binary event in 7 sessions, but SEBI flag dominates. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RRKABEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock fell 5% on Q4 despite strong topline (flat margins). Today's +12.7% gap-up looks like short-cover/sympathy with capex theme rather than fundamental re-rating. 25x FY28 earnings is rich. Cluster check: HAL already in defence/capex book."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Risk-off day with VIX 18.57; broad-beta ETF would just import sector weakness. Better to stay selective."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 (1.5% below CMP) appropriately placed; thesis intact post-Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Consolidation after gold near record highs; thesis (central bank demand, geopolitics) intact. SL 119 has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ATH breakout, fundamentals strong. SL 1710 is tight (0.78% gap) but represents structural breakout level - let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 sitting 0.3% below CMP 13443 - at decision point. Fundamentals strong but auto sector weak. Respect SL if breached."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 only 0.3% below CMP. Q4 turnaround intact but banking sector weak today is the test. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry breakeven. P&L +1.4% not yet at +2% threshold to trail higher. Strong defence thesis, new CMD catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CEMPRO - watch for pullback to 880-900 (Rs 5,144 cr Q4 orders, 24,545 cr book). RRKABEL - watch for consolidation post gap. WOCKPHARMA - bypass; valuation extreme. MANAPPURAM - bypass on SEBI flag.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day-16: Book is 34% deployed with 6 positions. Three positions (MARUTI, BANDHANBNK, ADANIPORTS) sitting within 1% of their SLs - meaningful concentration of stop-out risk on a weak tape. Adding SOBHA at 5% size on isolated earnings strength keeps deployed at ~39% with cash buffer comfortable. Risk-off backdrop with VIX 18.57 + US weakness argues against stacking more cyclicals today. If 2-3 SLs trigger same session, that's ~Rs 4-6k drawdown - well within daily loss limit but signals broader regime shift."
}
